# `main.tsx`

## 📋 Purpose

Application entry point. Mounts the React root into `#root`, registers the Vite PWA service worker, and boots the scripting engine.

> **Source file:** `src/main.tsx`

| `./App.tsx` | `App` |
| [`virtual:pwa-register`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/virtual:pwa-register) | `registerSW` |
